body: {"ac_map":[{"parent_ac":"1. `ddx init --global` creates `~/.claude/skills/ddx` and `~/.agents/skills/ddx` pointing into `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/ddx/` and writes `${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/config.yaml` — TestInitGlobal_CreatesAgentTierLinks.","coverage":"child 1 AC1 covers agent-tier links; child 1 AC2 covers global config; child 1 AC3 runs TestInitGlobal_CreatesAgentTierLinks and TestInitGlobal_WritesGlobalConfig."},{"parent_ac":"2. `ddx init` (no flag, in-project) does NOT write to any `plugins/` tree; the plugin lazy-resolves from the global layer — TestInitProject_DoesNotInstallPlugins.","coverage":"child 2 AC1 covers no project-local plugin writes; child 2 AC2 covers lazy resolution from the global layer; child 2 AC3 runs TestInitProject_DoesNotInstallPlugins and TestInitProject_LeavesPluginsForLazyResolution."},{"parent_ac":"3. cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./cmd/... green.","coverage":"child 1 AC4; child 2 AC4."},{"parent_ac":"4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.","coverage":"child 1 AC5; child 2 AC5."}],"child_ids":["ddx-07af62e6","ddx-42c2c630"],"rationale":"Split into two independently executable units along behavior boundaries: global machine setup for `ddx init --global`, and plain project init becoming zero-footprint. This keeps each child within the CLI/plugin subsystem, preserves the parent non-scope list, preserves dependency ddx-06cbaa90 and sibling-bead requirements, and maps every parent verification requirement to named child AC."}

- AC2 (TestInitProject_DoesNotInstallPlugins): PASS — plain ddx init does not write .ddx/plugins/, .agents/skills/ddx, or .claude/skills/ddx
- AC3: go test ./cmd/... exits 0
- AC4: lefthook run pre-commit passes (no staged files → no checks blocked)
